title: Count distinct giving wrong results
poc: CREATE TABLE tab0(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER);
SELECT COUNT ( DISTINCT + 45 ) AS col2 FROM tab0;
key_bug_features: COUNT DISTINCT with arithmetic operation on constant
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab1(col0 INTEGER, col1 FLOAT, col2 VARCHAR(10), col3 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO tab1 VALUES (10, 20.5, 'test1', TRUE), (30, NULL, 'test2', FALSE), (50, 15.0, NULL, TRUE);
CREATE TABLE tab2(colA INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, colB INTEGER NOT NULL);
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT col1 + 10) AS distinct_count FROM tab1 WHERE col3 IS TRUE;
